revision.content:
Greetings Bloominglabs Members and all enterprising makers! I am [[User:Josh | Josh Crawley]], one of the newest members of Bloominglabs.
My interests that brought me here revolve around 3d vision, objects, Atmel, Arduino, programming and the like.

* I am currently working on my own [[RepRap Prusa i2]] which I shall try better to update.
* My next project will be a 3d laser line scanner. Parts used will be printed by my printer.

* From 3/15 to 3/17, I also attended the [[Midwest RepRap Festival]], held in Elkhart.

[[Category:Projects]]
